title: The Strange Case of Dr. Jekyll and Mr. Hyde
author: Robert Louis Stevenson

setting.note: A door in a back street in Soho, and a respectable house around the corner that turns out to be the same building. The whole novella is an argument about a floor plan.

rights.originalWork: TODO: confirm. Robert Louis Stevenson published this in 1886.
